results.title: XRP climbs 8% as record holder losses signal better risk-reward for buyers
results.description: The token's 30-day and 365-day MVRV, a measure of how far holders are underwater, sit near -45% and -47%, lows Santiment says XRP has never reached before. Some traders read stretched losses as a contrarian signal.

results.title: Vijay Kedia shares a simple market lesson that most retail investors miss: Don't chase today's favourite
results.description: In a post on social media platform X on July 2, Kedia said markets do not move in a straight line but instead rotate through different phases, creating fresh opportunities for investors who can identify them early.

results.title: ALEX BRUMMER: There are healthy signs the Supreme Court is not totally capitulating to Trump
results.description: Today, July 4, as America commemorates its 250th birthday, there are healthy signs that the Supreme Court is not totally capitulating to Trump.
